title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TNT India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TNT India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!
